name: PlayCanvas Editor MCP Server
what_it_does: Official PlayCanvas Editor MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the PlayCanvas 3D game engine editor — creating and modifying scene entities, managing components and assets, scripting game logic, and integrating PlayCanvas's WebGL-based game engine into agent-driven 3D content creation and game development workflows.
use_cases: Creating and modifying 3D scene entities from game development agents
Managing PlayCanvas assets and materials from content creation agents
Scripting game logic and entity components from coding agents
Automating level design tasks from game design agents
Generating 3D scenes from natural language from creative agents
Integrating AI assistance into PlayCanvas game development workflows
not_for: Non-PlayCanvas 3D engines (Unity, Unreal, Godot require different MCPs)
Offline desktop game development (PlayCanvas is browser-based)
Teams not using PlayCanvas for 3D/WebGL game development
best_when: A game developer using PlayCanvas's web-based 3D engine needs AI assistance in the editor — creating scenes, managing entities, and automating game development tasks.
avoid_when: You're using Unity, Unreal Engine, or other game engines — PlayCanvas-specific tools only work with PlayCanvas.

auth.notes: PlayCanvas API token required. Generate from PlayCanvas account settings. Official MCP from PlayCanvas team.

pricing.free_tier_limits: PlayCanvas: free plan with 200MB storage, public projects
pricing.notes: PlayCanvas free plan supports API access. MCP server is free open source. Official MCP from PlayCanvas.

performance.rate_limits: PlayCanvas API rate limits — see developer documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Requires active PlayCanvas project — agents must know project and scene IDs
3D scene context is complex — agents need PlayCanvas entity/component knowledge
Editor operations may conflict with human editor sessions — coordinate usage
PlayCanvas API covers editor operations but not runtime game logic
Asset uploads and large scene modifications can be slow
Official MCP but niche — limited community examples and patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. PlayCanvas API token required. Official MCP. Token grants access to all projects — store securely. Coordinate editor access with team.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token grants full project access. Official MCP. Store token securely.
